front: Eu priorizo a durabilidade a longo prazo quando compro tecnologia.
pronunciation: ew pry-oo-REE-zoo ah doo-rah-bee-lee-DAH-jee ah LOONG-goo PRAH-zoo KWAHN-doo COHM-proo tehk-noo-loo-ZHEE-ah.
back: I prioritize long-term durability when I buy technology.
context: Stating hardware consumption philosophies focusing on 'durabilidade'.

front: Esta máquina tem desempenho suficiente para compilar códigos pesados.
pronunciation: EHS-tah MAH-kee-nah tehyng jeh-zehm-PEHN-yoo soo-fee-SYEHN-chee PAH-rah coohm-pee-LAHR KOH-jee-goos peh-ZAH-doos.
back: This machine has sufficient performance to compile heavy code.
context: Evaluating computing assets via 'desempenho' (performance).

front: Eu comprei um notebook com vinte e quatro gigabytes de memória RAM.
pronunciation: ew kohm-PRAY oong notebook coong VEENG-chee ee KWAH-troo gee-gah-BY-chees jee meh-MOH-ryah RAM.
back: I bought a laptop with twenty-four gigabytes of RAM memory.
context: Detailing technical hardware specs using precise memory metrics.

front: O processador M4 gerencia a energia de forma muito eficiente.
pronunciation: oo proo-seh-sah-DOHR M4 zheh-REHN-syah ah eh-nehr-ZHEE-ah jee FOHR-mah MOOI-too ee-fee-syEHN-chee.
back: The M4 processor manages power in a very efficient way.
context: Discussing modern silicon performance architectures.

front: A carcaça de alumínio protege o hardware contra impactos diários.
pronunciation: ah kahr-KAH-sah jee ah-loo-MEE-nyoo proo-TEH-zhee oo hardware COOHN-trah eeym-PAK-toos jee-AH-ryoos.
back: The aluminum chassis protects the hardware against daily impacts.
context: Praising structural build durability using 'carcaça de alumínio'.

front: Eu prefiro usar um monitor externo grande para trabalhar em casa.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo oo-ZAHR oong moo-nee-TOHR ehks-TEHR-noo GRAHN-jee PAH-rah trah-bah-LYAHR ahyng KAH-zah.
back: I prefer to use a large external monitor to work from home.
context: Describing layout space upgrades using 'monitor externo'.

front: O teclado desse dispositivo é conhecido por ser muito resistente.
pronunciation: oo teh-KLAH-do DEHS-ee dees-poo-zee-CHEE-vo eh coohn-ye-SEE-doo poor sayr MOOI-too heh-zees-TEHN-too.
back: The keyboard of this device is known for being very resilient.
context: Highlighting hardware component life cycles via 'teclado resistente'.

front: Como posso transferir meus arquivos antigos para a máquina nova?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo trahns-feh-REER meus ahr-KEE-voos ahn-CHEE-goos PAH-rah ah MAH-kee-nah NOH-vah?
back: How can I transfer my old files to the new machine?
context: Querying local data migration workflows using 'transferir arquivos'.

front: O armazenamento interno de quinhentos gigabytes é veloz.
pronunciation: oo ahr-mah-zeh-nah-MEHN-too eeyng-TEHR-noo jee keeyng-YEHN-toos gee-gah-BY-chees eh veh-LOZ.
back: The internal storage of five hundred gigabytes is fast.
context: Detailing SSD system configurations using 'armazenamento interno'.

front: Eu invisto em equipamentos caros se eles durarem muitos anos.
pronunciation: ew eeyng-VEES-too ahyng ee-kee-pah-MEHN-toos KAH-roos see EH-lees doo-RAH-rehyng MOOI-toos AH-noos.
back: I invest in expensive equipment if they last for many years.
context: Discussing equipment amortization choices; triggers the future subjunctive 'durarem'.

front: A vida útil da bateria é um fator decisivo para mim.
pronunciation: ah VEE-dah OO-cheew dah bah-teh-REE-ah eh oong fah-TOHR jee-see-SEE-vo PAH-rah meeyng.
back: The battery life cycle is a decisive factor for me.
context: Evaluating portable hardware setups using 'vida útil da bateria'.

front: Esse modelo portátil cabe facilmente na mochila de viagem.
pronunciation: EHS-ee moo-DEH-loo pohr-TAH-cheew KAH-bee fah-seew-MEHN-chee nah moo-SHEE-lah jee vy-AH-zhehyng.
back: This portable model fits easily in the travel backpack.
context: Describing transport mobility metrics using 'modelo portátil'.

front: Eu configurei um mouse ergonômico para evitar dores no pulso.
pronunciation: ew kohn-fee-goo-RAY oong mouse ehr-goo-NOH-mee-koo PAH-rah ee-vee-TAHR DOH-rees noo POOW-soo.
back: I configured an ergonomic mouse to avoid wrist pain.
context: Optimizing desk health mechanics using 'mouse ergonômico'.

front: O sistema operacional roda liso sem nenhum tipo de engasgo.
pronunciation: oo sees-TEH-mah oo-peh-rah-syo-NAW HOH-dah LEE-zoo sayng nee-NYOONG CHEE-poo jee eeyng-GAHS-goo.
back: The operating system runs smoothly without any kind of stutter.
context: Praising runtime software stability using the colloquialism 'roda liso'.

front: Vale a pena investir em uma boa cadeira de escritório?
pronunciation: VAH-lee ah PEH-nah eeyng-vehs-TEER ahyng OO-mah BOH-ah kah-DAY-rah jee ees-cree-TOH-ryoo?
back: Is it worth investing in a good office chair?
context: Inquiring about workspace posture infrastructure setups.

front: A tela de alta resolução cansa menos os olhos durante a noite.
pronunciation: ah TEH-lah jee AW-tah heh-zoo-loo-SOHNG KAHN-sah MEH-noos ooz OH-lyoos doo-RAHN-chee ah NOY-chee.
back: The high-resolution screen tires the eyes less during the night.
context: Discussing display hardware capabilities via 'alta resolução'.

front: Eu uso adaptadores USB para conectar meus periféricos antigos.
pronunciation: ew OO-zoo ah-dahp-tah-DOHREES USB PAH-rah coohn-ehk-TAHR meus peh-ree-FEH-ree-koos ahn-CHEE-goos.
back: I use USB adapters to connect my old peripherals.
context: Handling connection standard legacy wrappers using 'periféricos'.

front: Este computador foi projetado para aguentar uso profissional intenso.
pronunciation: EHS-chee coohm-poo-tah-DOHR foy proo-zheh-TAH-do PAH-rah ah-gwehyng-TAHR OO-zoo proo-fee-syo-NAW eeyng-TEHYN-soo.
back: This computer was designed to withstand intense professional use.
context: Stating commercial-grade component build qualities via 'aguentar uso'.

front: A velocidade de leitura do disco rígido influencia o boot.
pronunciation: ah veh-loo-see-DAH-jee jee lay-TOO-rah doo DEES-koo REE-zhee-do eeyng-floo-EHYNS-yah oo boot.
back: The read speed of the hard drive influences the boot process.
context: Analyzing low-level storage data pathways.

front: Eu prefiro manter a minha mesa limpa e organizada.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo mahn-TEHR ah MEENG-yah MEH-zah LEEYM-pah ee oohr-gah-nee-ZAH-dah.
back: I prefer to keep my desk clean and organized.
context: Describing visual workspace minimalist habits using 'mesa limpa'.

front: O resfriamento dessa máquina é silencioso mesmo sob carga.
pronunciation: oo hehs-fry-ah-MEHN-too DEHS-ah MAH-kee-nah eh see-lehyng-SYOH-zoo MEYS-moo SOHB KAHR-gah.
back: The cooling of this machine is silent even under load.
context: Discussing thermal architecture acoustics using 'resfriamento'.

front: Eu troquei os cabos para melhorar a organização visual.
pronunciation: ew troo-KAY ooz KAH-boos PAH-rah meh-lyo-RAHR ah oohr-gah-nee-zah-SOHNG vee-zoo-AW.
back: I swapped the cables to improve the visual organization.
context: Managing cable layout customisations inside a clean room setup.

front: Qual marca oferece o melhor suporte técnico pós-venda?
pronunciation: kwaw MAHR-kah oh-feh-REH-see oo meh-LYOHR soo-POHR-chee TEHK-nee-koo pohz-VEHN-dah?
back: Which brand offers the best after-sales technical support?
context: Evaluating company customer service parameters via 'suporte técnico'.

front: A atualização do sistema corrigiu o problema de compatibilidade.
pronunciation: ah ah-too-ah-lee-zah-SOHNG doo sees-TEH-mah coohr-hee-ZHEEW oo proo-BLEH-mah jee coohm-pah-tee-bee-lee-DAH-jee.
back: The system update fixed the compatibility issue.
context: Handling OS validation runtime bugs via 'atualização do sistema'.

front: Eu comprei uma capa protetora para evitar arranhões na carcaça.
pronunciation: ew kohm-PRAY OO-mah KAH-pah proo-teh-TOH-rah PAH-rah ee-vee-TAHR ah-hahn-YOHNGS nah kahr-KAH-sah.
back: I bought a protective sleeve to avoid scratches on the casing.
context: Securing structural physical assets using 'capa protetora'.

front: A placa gráfica integrada consome muito menos bateria.
pronunciation: ah PLAH-kah GRAH-fee-kah eeyng-teh-GRAH-dah coohn-SOH-mee MOOI-too MEH-noos bah-teh-REE-ah.
back: The integrated graphics card consumes much less battery.
context: Discussing component power management variables.

front: Eu prefiro usar fones de ouvido com cancelamento de ruído ativo.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo oo-ZAHR FOH-nees jee oo-VEE-doo coong kahn-seh-lah-MEHN-too jee hoo-EE-doo ah-CHEE-vo.
back: I prefer to use headphones with active noise cancellation.
context: Optimizing auditory focus profiles using 'cancelamento de ruído'.

front: O roteador antigo não aguenta a velocidade da fibra óptica.
pronunciation: oo hoo-teh-ah-DOHR ahn-CHEE-go nohng ah-GWEHYNG-tah ah veh-loo-see-DAH-jee dah FEE-brah OH-chee-kah.
back: The old router can't handle the speed of the fiber optics.
context: Identifying network local infrastructure bottleneck limitations.

front: Eu fiz um backup completo antes de formatar a máquina.
pronunciation: ew fees oong backup coohm-PLEH-too AHN-chees jee fohr-mah-TAHR ah MAH-kee-nah.
back: I made a complete backup before formatting the machine.
context: Executing safe system maintenance protocols using 'fazer um backup'.

front: A nitidez da imagem ajuda na hora de ler documentações longas.
pronunciation: ah nee-chee-DEHZ dah ee-MAH-zhehyng ah-ZHOO-dah nah OH-rah jee layr doo-koo-mehn-tah-SOHNGS LOONG-gahs.
back: The sharpness of the image helps when reading long documentations.
context: Praising layout presentation legibility parameters using 'nitidez'.

front: Essas portas adicionais facilitam a conexão de múltiplos dispositivos.
pronunciation: EHS-ahs POHR-tahs ah-jee-syo-NAYS fah-see-LEE-tahyng ah coohn-ehk-SOHNG jee MOOW-chee-ploos dees-poo-zee-CHEE-voos.
back: These additional ports facilitate the connection of multiple devices.
context: Discussing IO connectivity expansion options via 'portas adicionais'.

front: A fonte de alimentação deve ser robusta para evitar picos de energia.
pronunciation: ah FOHNT-ee jee ah-lee-mehyng-tah-SOHNG DEH-vee sayr hoo-BOOS-tah PAH-rah ee-vee-TAHR PEE-koos jee eh-nehr-ZHEE-ah.
back: The power supply must be robust to avoid power surges.
context: Securing local power grid infrastructure parameters.

front: Eu ajustei a altura do monitor para ficar na linha dos olhos.
pronunciation: ew ah-zhoos-TAY ah aw-TOO-rah doo moo-nee-TOHR PAH-rah fee-KAHR nah LEENG-yah doos OH-lyoos.
back: I adjusted the monitor height to be in the eye line.
context: Configuring workplace ergonomic positioning coordinates.

front: A sincronização na nuvem garante que eu não perca nenhum dado.
pronunciation: ah seeyng-croo-nee-zah-SOHNG nah NOO-vehyng gah-RAHN-chee kee ew nohng PEHR-kah nee-NYOONG DAH-do.
back: Cloud synchronization ensures that I don't lose any data.
context: Protecting asset distributions via remote synchronization formats.

front: Estou muito satisfeito com o rendimento do meu novo equipamento.
pronunciation: ees-TOY MOOI-too sah-chees-FAY-too coong oo hehynd-ee-MEHN-too doo mew NOH-voo ee-kee-pah-MEHN-too.
back: I am very satisfied with the performance of my new equipment.
context: Celebrating successful gear acquisition integrations. Female speakers use 'satisfeita'.
